title: Brain Problem
content:
bq.. One day, Thaksin got something wrong with his brain
so he went to see a doctor. After medical examination,
the doctor told him:

"Your brain has two parts: one is left, and another is right.
Your left brain has nothing right. Your right brain has nothing left."

p. via "onopen.com":http://www.onopen.com/2006/editor-spaces/345

Nothing, I'm just spreading the words. ;)
